full_text:
Liu (Ziping) 劉 (子平)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu (劉), styledZiping (子平), was born in Pingyuan commandery. Recommended that Liu Bei lead an army against the Yellow Turbans, but Liu Bei almost died. Liu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Gongsun Zan.
